selectivity_anchors.strategy: Add positive residue to repel LT-α

peptide_designs.name: TNF_Z2_SEL_D2E3
peptide_designs.selectivity: ARG131 in TNF-α vs LEU131 in LT-α - negative peptide charges bind ARG but are repelled by LEU

peptide_designs.name: TNF_Z2_SEL_K90E
peptide_designs.selectivity: LYS90 in TNF-α vs GLN90 in LT-α - GLU forms salt bridge with LYS but not GLN

peptide_designs.name: TNF_Z2_SEL_DUAL
peptide_designs.selectivity: Dual targeting of ARG131 and LYS90 - both present in TNF-α, both absent in LT-α

peptide_designs.name: TNF_Z2_SEL_BAL
peptide_designs.selectivity: Maintains net charge near neutral for better solubility while preserving selectivity contacts

peptide_designs.name: TNF_Z2_TRI_001
peptide_designs.selectivity: Targets the unique trimer cleft geometry of TNF-α vs LT-α

best_design.name: TNF_Z2_SEL_DUAL
best_design.rationale: Dual selectivity anchors (ARG131 + LYS90) + Z² aromatic stacking
